0110000011001110 0110001110010100 1 -> sum: 1100010001100011, cout: 0
0100110010001010 0001010100100111 0 -> sum: 0110000110110001, cout: 0

1100101000010101 1100011000100010 1 -> sum: 1001000000111000, cout: 1
1000010010101001 0110001110101111 1 -> sum: 1110100001011001, cout: 0

0111111111111111 1000000000000001 1 -> sum: 0000000000000001, cout: 1
